changes: Iteration 1: Replaced dots tiles (dots-1 through dots-9) with drawn circular artwork. Each dot is rendered as a teal circle with concentric ring effect and subtle highlight, arranged in traditional mahjong patterns.

Iteration 2: Drew bamboo stick artwork (bam-2 to bam-9 as green sticks with segment nodes, bam-1 as stylized bird/sparrow). Character tiles now show Chinese numerals + 萬 in deep red-black ink with a traditional red seal/chop mark.

Iteration 3: Honor tiles upgraded - Wind tiles now have calligraphic seal circle borders, compass dots at cardinal positions, and brush-stroke texture effect. Dragon tiles: Red (中) gets vermillion rounded-rect frame with inner glow, Green (發) gets bamboo-leaf corner accents, White (白) gets traditional empty double-line frame.

Iteration 4: Bonus tiles and dots-1 upgrade. Flower tiles (梅蘭菊竹) now have ink wash botanical artwork - Plum with pink blossoms on dark branches, Orchid with curved leaves and purple flowers, Chrysanthemum with layered orange petals, Bamboo with green stalks and pointed leaves. Season tiles (春夏秋冬) have themed scenes - Spring cherry blossoms with sprouts, Summer sun with lush leaves, Autumn falling maple leaves, Winter bare branches with snowflakes. Dots-1 enhanced with ornate multi-ring concentric design (rays, decorative dots, teal/blue palette). All bonus tiles show corner number and Chinese name.

Iteration 5: Green felt table surface replacing rice paper (dark green #1a5c2e with fiber texture), procedural wood grain texture on border frame (dark walnut with grain lines, wavy curves, and knot details), brass corner brackets at all 4 corners of the table (L-shaped with metallic finish). Inner overlay tinted green, decorative border lines changed to warm gold contrast.

Iteration 6: Reverted table surface from green felt back to correct cream/parchment (#f5eed6) per mockup reference. Added warm wood panel wall background with honey-gold tones and vertical grain pattern. Inner overlay tint corrected to warm cream. Wood border frame and brass corners preserved.

Iteration 7: Enhanced lighting and atmosphere. Reduced ambient light (0.75→0.55) and boosted directional light (1.1→1.35) for stronger shadow contrast. Increased shadow radius to 4. Added warm CSS vignette overlay darkening screen edges. Boosted ink decoration visibility (ensō strokes +30%, bamboo motifs 0.18→0.25, cloud wisps 0.12→0.18). Added subtle ambient occlusion gradient to table edges. Darkened tile edge color for better contrast against table.

Iteration 8: Changed tile backs from jade green (#3a5c4a) to warm taupe/brown (#8a7a68 → #6e5f4e gradient) matching mockup's ivory tile back look. Added diamond lattice crosshatch pattern with light highlight and dark shadow lines for woven texture effect. Wall tiles now blend harmoniously with the cream parchment table surface.

Iteration 9: Lightened wall tile backs from dark taupe (#8a7a68) to cream/ivory (#ede4d0 → #d0c8b4) to match mockup's light-colored wall tiles. Updated faceDown side/bottom/front colors to complementary warm cream tones (0xe0d8c8, 0xd0c8b8, 0xe8e0d0). Adjusted diamond lattice opacity for visibility on lighter background.

Iteration 10: Dramatically boosted ink decoration visibility across the board. Ensō circle: alpha [0.50,0.32,0.20]→[0.65,0.45,0.30], stroke widths [12,18,24]→[16,22,30]. Bamboo motifs: globalAlpha 0.25→0.55, thicker stalks/leaves. Cloud wisps: globalAlpha 0.18→0.40, lineWidth 2→3.5, added more wisp lines. Vermillion seal: all alphas ~2x, square 44→56px. Ink decorations are now clearly visible at game camera distance.

Iteration 11: Replaced emoji avatars (🐱🦊🐰🐼) with ink-wash sumi-e portrait silhouettes using inline SVG data URIs. Each player now has a unique brush-stroke portrait — Lin (woman with hair bun), Chen (man with topknot), Kenji (elder with beard), Yuki (woman with flowing hair). Player names updated from Mochi/Kitsune/Usagi to Yuki/Kenji/Lin/Chen. Win modal kanji initials: 林陳健雪. Matches mockup's traditional East Asian ink portrait aesthetic.

Iteration 12: Made wall tiles chunkier and more 3D. Increased tile depth from 0.30→0.38 in create3DTile and 0.28→0.38 in createWalls. Scaled wall tiles from 0.85→0.95 for more presence on table. Darkened face-down tile edge colors (sideColor 0xe0d8c8→0xd8ceb8, frontColor 0xe8e0d0→0xdcd4c0) for better depth contrast. Increased layer spacing for clearer two-tier stacking.

Iteration 13: Multicolored dots tiles — changed dots 2-9 from uniform teal to traditional multicolored pattern. Dots now alternate between green (#2a8a6a), red (#c03030), and blue (#2a4a8a) circles matching real mahjong tile colors. Each tile has a unique color assignment per dot position (e.g., dots-5 has green/red/blue/green/red). Much more authentic and visually rich.

Iteration 14: Muted background from saturated golden honey-brown wood (#8B6914 etc.) to light warm maple/birch tones (#c4a87a, #d0b88e, #c8ab80). Softened wood grain line colors and horizontal band contrast. Updated CSS body gradient to match. Background no longer dominates — much closer to mockup's subtle warm parchment/light wood feel.

Iteration 15: Enlarged center discard tiles for readability — scale 0.7→0.88, tile spacing 0.42→0.52, row spacing 0.56→0.62, zone bases 1.4→1.2 (pulled more central). Discarded tiles are now large enough to show their face artwork clearly at camera distance.

Iteration 16: Replaced flat wood panel background with ink-wash mountain landscape. 3 layers of misty mountains at different depths using warm gray-brown washes (opacity 0.06-0.13). Added atmospheric mist between layers, ink spatter for aged paper feel, and warm center glow. Background now evokes traditional sumi-e painting atmosphere matching the Paper & Ink theme.

Iteration 17: Enlarged player info panels for prominence — avatars 44px→64px, name font 13px→16px, score/wind font 11px→13px, padding 6px 12px→8px 16px, thicker avatar border (2.5px), stronger shadows, panels pulled inward from screen edges (12px→24-28px). Player panels now read as prominent visual elements framing the table, matching mockup.
